world.title: China landslide today: Seven pulled from rubble after landslide strikes Chongqing, south-west China
world.desc:
Seven people have been rescued after a devastating landslide struck southwest China’s Chongqing Municipality this morning.
The landslide occurred at around 9:00am on Friday in Pengshui Miao and Tujia Autonomous County, affecting an area along a section of the Wujiang River.
Local authorities confirmed the initial rescues on Friday afternoon. However, the exact number of people still missing remains unconfirmed.
